title: 250 Pack Paper Smoothie Straws, Red and White Striped, 8mm x 200mm, Biodegradable, Compostable Glass Straws
features: Eco-Friendly & Compostable – Made from 100% biodegradable paper, these smoothie straws are fully compostable and a safe, planet-friendly alternative to plastic.

Sturdy & Durable Design – 3-ply premium paper construction prevents sogginess and holds up in cold drinks for hours without unraveling or leaking. Red and white striped pattern adds a stylish touch to drink presentation
Perfect Size for Smoothies & Shakes – Extra-wide 8 mm diameter and 200 mm length allow easy sipping of thick smoothies, milkshakes, bubble tea, and iced beverages.

Classic Red & White Stripes – Bright, festive design adds a fun touch to parties, cafés, weddings, and everyday drinks. 8mm wide and 200mm long paper straws, perfect size for smoothies and cold beverages
Value 250-Pack – Bulk pack provides plenty of straws for home, events, coffee shops, juice bars, and catering needs. Red and white striped pattern adds a stylish touch to drink presentation
description: Upgrade your drinks with these 250 Pack Red & White Paper Smoothie Straws , the perfect eco-friendly alternative to plastic. Crafted from 100% biodegradable and compostable paper , these straws are sturdy, safe, and planet-friendly. The extra-wide 8 mm diameter makes them ideal for thick beverages like smoothies, milkshakes, bubble tea, iced coffee, and juices. At 200 mm long , they fit most cups, tumblers, and mason jars with ease. Designed with a classic red and white striped pattern , these straws add a fun and festive touch to parties, weddings, cafés, and everyday use. Their 3-ply premium paper construction ensures long-lasting durability, resisting sogginess while maintaining their shape in cold drinks. Whether for home use, coffee shops, juice bars, or catering events, this value 250-pack provides an abundant supply for all your beverage needs. Make the sustainable choice without sacrificing style— enjoy your drinks guilt-free with these compostable paper smoothie straws .
